strengths: Exceeds 15-year engineering requirement with ~20 years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-performance systems; MIT CS degree provides strong technical foundation
Demonstrated platform-building and founder experience: GISCollective (9+ years, open-source geo-data platform) shows sustained entrepreneurial commitment and systems thinking
Recent AI infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP frameworks, AI-agent tooling) indicates active pivot into AI specialization and hands-on AI engineering
concerns: Minimal demonstrated AI/ML expertise on resume: no machine learning projects, trained models, AI products, or recognized thought leadership before April 2025 role
Current AI role too nascent to validate depth: only 1.5 months at re:cinq; insufficient time to demonstrate the 'recognized expertise with demonstrated products' the job requires

No evidence of strategic cloud/AI product vision work: resume shows hands-on builder skills but lacks evidence of identifying future platform directions or advising on cutting-edge technology adoption

key_factors.factor: Recency and depth of AI experience

response.justification: Bogdan is a capable full-stack engineer with 20 years of experience and MIT credentials, demonstrating strong platform-building (GISCollective) and distributed systems work (Dunnhumby). However, he is poorly matched for a Principal Engineer — AI Strategy role because his resume shows minimal AI/ML background, no demonstrated AI products or platforms, and his only AI-related work began 1.5 months ago. The role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products,' which is not evident. His profile aligns better with Staff/Principal backend engineer or platform engineer roles focused on core infrastructure.
